title: Prawns in Saudi Arabian Ceviche
description: A refreshing and flavorful dish that combines the spices of Saudi Arabia with the zing of ceviche, featuring succulent prawns.

ingredients.name: Arabian Spices
ingredients.notes: Mix of cumin, coriander, and cardamom

instructions: Rinse the prawns under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
In a blender or food processor, combine tamarind, lemon juice, Arabian spices, and Saudi Arabian pepper.
Blend until smooth, then adjust seasoning if needed.
Place the prawns in a shallow dish, pour the blended mixture over them.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the prawns to 'cook' in the acidity.
Just before serving, garnish with cilantro and serve with lime wedges.
